name: trap-ballad
title: Trap Ballad
description: Slow, melodic, heartbroken trap — rolling 808s under a tender, melancholy topline.
style: melodic trap ballad, slow rolling 808s, soft hi-hat triplets, dreamy guitar, melancholy, ~72 BPM, emotional half-sung male vocal, light autotune optional

production.drums: trap kit, triplet hats, soft kick

hookGuidance: sung, anthemic, repeatable — the part that makes people text their ex
